description: Upper: Leather upper with aggressive stitch detailing and embossed branding on the lateral side of the heelStitches on the seams of the toe boxTwo-hole lace upPadded tonguePadded insole for in-step comfortRemovable sockliner to accommodate an orthoticMidsole: Rubber midsole for cushioningOutsole: Dual density TPU outsole with geometric lugs for grip and tractionUpraised heel and curved midfootOutsole reinforced onto the upper as a heel guard
